name: Crawfish Fettucine or Monica
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and celery in margarine until soft.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (crawfish tails, fettucini noodles, heavy cream or half-and-half) to the skillet.
3. Cook for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are tender and the sauce has thickened.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot over cooked fettucini noodles.
